class.name: AccessibilitySettings
class.brief_description: Provides settings to override and customize [Node] accessibility properties.
class.description: [AccessibilitySettings] is a resource that provides settings to override and customize [Node] accessibility properties. It will take priority over the properties and built-in accessibility notification handlers defined in [Control].

method.name: _invalidate
method.description: If implemented, called when accessibility elements are invalidated. Eqvivalent to the [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_ACCESSIBILITY_INVALIDATE] notification.

method.name: _update
method.description: If implemented, called when an accessibility information update is required. Eqvivalent to the [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_ACCESSIBILITY_UPDATE] notification.

method.name: add_custom_action
method.description: Adds a custom action. [signal action_custom] is emitted with [param id] when the action is triggered.

method.name: add_subelement
method.description: Adds [param settings] as a sub-element. Can be used to add sub-elements such as list items or table cells without adding a child node. Use [method grab_subelement_focus] to control sub-element focus.

method.name: get_custom_action_description
method.description: Returns the custom action description at index [param idx].

method.name: get_custom_action_id
method.description: Returns the custom action ID at index [param idx].

method.name: get_subelement
method.description: Returns the sub-element at index [param idx].

method.name: get_subelement_bounds
method.description: Returns the sub-element bounds at index [param idx].

method.name: grab_subelement_focus
method.description: Steals the focus from another sub-element and becomes the focused sub-element. This has an effect only if the owner [Node] has accessibility focus, and will not change the global [Control] focus.

method.name: remove_custom_action
method.description: Removes the custom action at index [param idx].

method.name: remove_subelement
method.description: Removes the sub-elements at index [param idx].

method.name: set_custom_action_description
method.description: Sets the custom action description at index [param idx].

method.name: set_custom_action_id
method.description: Sets the custom action ID at index [param idx].

method.name: set_subelement
method.description: Sets the sub-element [AccessibilitySettings] at index [param idx].

method.name: set_subelement_bounds
method.description: Sets the sub-element bounds at index [param idx].

members.member: Human-readable node description.
Priority of the live region updates.
Human-readable node name.
Background color of the text.
Number of custom actions.
Extra information added to the node name.
Node accessibility flags.
Foreground color of the text.

Number of items in the list, tab bar, or menu. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB_BAR], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU].

If [code]true[/code], list item is expanded. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX_OPTION], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_CHECK_BOX], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_RADIO].

Index of the list item. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX_OPTION], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_CHECK_BOX], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_RADIO].

Hierarchical level of the list item. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX_OPTION], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_CHECK_BOX], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_RADIO].

If [code]true[/code], list item is selected. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX_OPTION], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_CHECK_BOX], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU_ITEM_RADIO].

If [code]true[/code], list is vertical (e.g., menu or list box), otherwise horizontal (e.g. tab bar). [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TREE], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_LIST_BOX], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TAB_BAR], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_MENU].
List of default actions overridden by [AccessibilitySettings]. Enabled actions will emit their corresponding signals when triggered.
Placeholder text of the node.
Accessibility role of the node.
Human-readable description of the custom accessibility role.
Current scroll position of scrollable node. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_BAR] or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_VIEW].
Horizontal scrolling range. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_BAR] or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_VIEW].
Vertical scrolling range. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_BAR] or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_SCROLL_VIEW].
Keyboard shortcut for the default action.
If [code]true[/code], node is in checked or pressed state.
Human-readable of the current custom node state.
Number of sub-elements. Sub-elements can be used to add list items or table cells without adding a child node.
List of supported default actions. If an action is marked as supported, but not overridden, the default node action handler is called.

Row and column of the table cell element. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_CELL], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_ROW_GROUP], [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_ROW_HEADER], or [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_COLUMN_HEADER].
Row and column span of the table cell element. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_CELL].
Number of columns in the table. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TABLE].
Number of rows in the table. [b]Note:[/b] Used if [member role] is set to [constant DisplayServer.ROLE_TABLE].
Text horizontal alignment.
Text orientation.
Tooltip text.
URL.
String value. Used only if [member value_type] has the [constant VALUE_STRING] flag set.
Color value. Used only if [member value_type] has [constant VALUE_COLOR] flag set.
Numeric value. Used only if [member value_type] has [constant VALUE_NUMBER] flag set.
Numeric value jump. Used only if [member value_type] has [constant VALUE_NUMBER] flag set.
Numeric value range. Used only if [member value_type] has [constant VALUE_NUMBER] flag set.
Numeric value step. Used only if [member value_type] has [constant VALUE_NUMBER] flag set.
Value used by node, multiple types can be selected.
